home.title: Toza defaultlar bilan tezroq ship qiling.
home.description: Vite, React, TypeScript, REST API helperlar, JWT auth, i18n, Redux Toolkit, TanStack Query, Biome, Tailwind va Motion tayyor holatda keladi.

todos.title: Vazifalar
todos.description: REST service patternlari va typed state bilan feature module namunasi.
todos.apiNote: Live REST data yoqish uchun backendni VITE_API_URL orqali ulang.

animation.title: Yengil UI animatsiya
animation.description: Silliq mahsulot interaksiyalari, onboarding va marketing bo‘limlari uchun kichik Motion namunalari.

auth.jwtHint: Productionda server-set httpOnly cookie afzal. API talab qilsa, Bearer tokenlar ham qo‘llab-quvvatlanadi.
